issue_summary: Added a wrapper around MultiTermQueries to add span support: SpanMultiTermQueryWrapper<Q extends MultiTermQuery>. Using this wrapper its easy to add fuzzy/wildcard to e.g. a SpanNearQuery. This patch also refactors all RewriteMethods and Attributes in MTQ (class was unmaintainable).
javadoc_before:
/**
 * A SpanQuery version of {@link RegexQuery} allowing regular expression
 * queries to be nested within other SpanQuery subclasses.
 */
javadoc_after: /** * A SpanQuery version of {@link RegexQuery} allowing regular expression * queries to be nested within other SpanQuery subclasses. * @deprecated Use new SpanMultiTermQueryWrapper<RegexQuery>(new RegexQuery()) instead. * This query will be removed in Lucene 4.0 */
